---
title: "Lady Hester, or, Ursula’s Narrative."
---

## Lady Hester, or, Ursula’s Narrative.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1874
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

The Tauchnitz edition of this book (Leipzig 1874) also includes <i>The Mouth of the Leamy</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
